next_steps: Permanent-section pathology with immunohistochemistry (e.g., CD20, CD3, GFAP, Ki-67, EBV-EBER)
Special stains for microorganisms on brain biopsy tissue (Gram, AFB, GMS, PAS)
CSF analysis (cytology, flow cytometry, PCR for EBV and JC virus, protein, glucose)
Broad-spectrum microbiology cultures of biopsy tissue (aerobic, anaerobic, fungal, acid-fast bacilli)
Infectious disease consultation to consider broadening empiric coverage to include coverage for Nocardia and Listeria
Evaluation for occult systemic malignancy if pathology remains nondiagnostic
